description: When the user asks how Carvana's selling process works, the chatbot MUST call lookup_carvana_facts with topic=how_selling_works. Inventing the process steps in prose is a hallucination vector; the knowledge base is the single source of truth and ships a clickable carvana.com source link with every fact.

turns.message: how does selling my car to Carvana actually work? what are the steps?
